description: A World subclass that provides helpers for interacting with the rule builder
game: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE-

yohane_bitdb-v0.0.1.description:
# v0.0.1 Initial Alpha release
**Important**: As this is an alpha release, expect logic bugs and occasional softlocks

## Randomized Items
- Ally Unlocks & Upgrades
- Rare crafting materials
- Movement upgrades

## Locations
- Chests
- Boss defeats
- Ally rescues

## Goals
- Defeat all bosses to open the Infernal Altar and beat the final boss

## Other Features
- DeathLink

## Development Notes
- Non Progression items are not yet removed from chests
- Chest Logic is not finalized
- No notification in-game for found or received items 
- While close to a vanilla upgrade location, the associated upgrade is revoked to always enable collection of the respective item
- I don't own the game, this was only possible thanks to the massive library of pointers already collected by the community
yohane_bitdb-v0.0.1.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.0.1

yohane_bitdb-v0.0.2.description:
# v0.0.2 Chest logic and removing vanilla items
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SilicDev/Archipelago/compare/yohane_bitdb-v0.0.1...yohane_bitdb-v0.0.2
**Important**: As this is an alpha release, expect logic bugs and occasional softlocks

## Changes
- Vanilla Items now are taken from your inventory when obtained
- Chest logic is now mostly final
- Logic regions have been adjusted
yohane_bitdb-v0.0.2.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.0.2

yohane_bitdb-v0.0.3.description:
# v0.0.3 Logic fixes, reworked game start, client stability
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SilicDev/Archipelago/compare/yohane_bitdb-v0.0.2...yohane_bitdb-v0.0.3
**Important**: As this is an alpha release, expect logic bugs and occasional softlocks

## Changes
- Common materials have been removed from the junk pool, yen bundles have been added
- A Katar and Lailaps have been added to the starting inventory to ensure the player has a weapon to get through the Cast Tutorial Room
- Rare materials have been added to the itempool, enough to craft every item in the game once
- The client now waits until a game has been loaded to send items
- `/gamestatus` command has been added to allow inspecting the client and game state
- The client should now recover gracefully if the game disconnects during a session
- Lots of small logic adjustments, Shipwreck in particular had some bigger reworks

## Bug fixes
- Removing items now always ensures the value is `>= 0`, preventing underflows
- A crash when viewing the cutscene after freeing all allies has been fixed

## Internal
- Regions have been split further, and completely translated to RuleBuilder
yohane_bitdb-v0.0.3.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.0.3

yohane_bitdb-v0.0.4.description:
# v0.0.4 logic fixes and QoL
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SilicDev/Archipelago/compare/yohane_bitdb-v0.0.3...yohane_bitdb-v0.0.4

## Changes
- Musical Scores are now buffered if received while one has already been obtained. Only one can be used per death
- A lot of randomized rooms are now taken into account for logic to prevent having to warp back to reroll them (this primarily affects Crystalline Grotto)
- Boss requirements for Infernal Altar and Sea of Trees have been adjusted, previously there was a small chance of Riko being in Infernal Altar blocking the way to the Sea of Trees boss

## Bug fixes
- EarlyChikaBlocksMoved is no longer inverted for logic
- Vanilla Cute Pochette location has been fixed in the dictionary checking if the character quests need to take the upgrade item away to open the chest
yohane_bitdb-v0.0.4.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.0.4

yohane_bitdb-v0.0.5.description:
# v0.0.5 Item handling hotfix
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SilicDev/Archipelago/compare/yohane_bitdb-v0.0.4...yohane_bitdb-v0.0.5

## Bug Fixes:
- Due to an oversight already collected items would no longer be received after a reconnect

## Internal
- Rule caching has been enabled
yohane_bitdb-v0.0.5.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.0.5

yohane_bitdb-v0.0.6.description:
# v0.0.6 New options and logic fixes
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SilicDev/Archipelago/compare/yohane_bitdb-v0.0.5...yohane_bitdb-v0.0.6
***Important*** As options have changed names, it is recommended to regenerate your YAMLs
Apart from a logic rework happening right now this is essentially v0.1.0

# New features
- Hints can be toggled for Vanilla and AP locations of the upgrade items
- DeathLink Groups allow death link to be limited to only certain players
- Characters and Upgrades can now be placed as progressive items instead

# Changes
- If no item is equipped the client will attempt to auto equip received weapons and accessories
- Turning in the character upgrades is now a location
- A lot of small logic changes for specific chests
- More ways of getting past gold snails have been added, and they are now properly taken into account between regions
- Consumables are no longer considered "useful". While they are helpful, this ended up making most of the "junk" pool useful in a default run. They are now in line with other items that allow you to get health/dp/status recovery (like currency)

# Bug Fixes
- the client will no longer send `CreateHints` packets every time the respective flags are checked (I believed the flags would be set false correctly again)
- the Fashion for Dummies chest in Shipwreck no longer unlocks the second accessory slot if none had been obtained yet
yohane_bitdb-v0.0.6.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.0.6

yohane_bitdb-v0.1.0.description:
# v0.1.0 Region logic rework
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SilicDev/Archipelago/compare/yohane_bitdb-v0.0.6...yohane_bitdb-v0.1.0
This is mostly an internal change on top of 0.0.6

# Changes
- Debug logging is no longer enabled by default
- Unexpected client errors now print an additional message and always write to the client interface

# Bug fixes
- Hints no longer crash the client with Progressive Upgrades enabled, instead no hint is created for the AP Location

# Internal
- All areas of the game have been split further into smaller regions, simplifying direct chest logic and preparing for options that would change the normal progression

# Dev notes
- I finally own the game :D (technically already since 0.0.6 but nothing in that update would have required it)
yohane_bitdb-v0.1.0.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.1.0

yohane_bitdb-v0.1.1.description:
# v0.1.1 Logic fixes and Damage Link
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SilicDev/Archipelago/compare/yohane_bitdb-v0.1.0...yohane_bitdb-v0.1.1

# Changes
- DamageLink has been added. Damage you receive is sent 1:1 to every other DamageLink player.

# Bug fixes
- Logic fixes around region logic that was missed during the initial rework
- Chests cleared remotely should now be marked as opened
yohane_bitdb-v0.1.1.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.1.1

yohane_bitdb-v0.1.2.description:
# v0.1.2 Random starting weapon
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SilicDev/Archipelago/compare/yohane_bitdb-v0.1.1...yohane_bitdb-v0.1.2

# Changes
- Adds a `random_starting_weapon` option that replaces the default Katar starting item with a random weapon

# Bug fixes
- Logic fixes regarding Riko and Sea of Trees
- Damage Link now actually triggers correctly depending on the DamageLink setting
yohane_bitdb-v0.1.2.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.1.2
